channel.title: F3 CL: Python on SPCC Computer Club
channel.description: Recent content in F3 CL: Python on SPCC Computer Club

item.title: Python Assignment 1: Introduction to Python
item.description: This note is not meant to be complete! Please read through the CL note before reading this supplementary note. What is Python? Why Python? # Python is a powerful scripting language. Pythonists use it to script games and web scrapers and automate works. Data scientists use it for scientific computation, data analysis and visualisation, for instance, Big Data.
